title: QA verdict on one task iteration
description: What the QA subagent returns after authoring/confirming tests, running them, and grading code quality for the current task. `pass` is the keep gate: tests green (the task's own tests AND the full regression suite) AND quality_pass AND no gate_failures. QA edits only test files — never source — so author and critic have disjoint write scopes.

tests_authored.description: Test files QA created or strengthened this iteration. Empty when the task's acceptance_criteria are already covered by existing tests (QA then grades quality only). Tests are strengthen-only: QA never weakens or deletes a passing test to make a change pass.

regression_green.description: True iff every test that passed before this task still passes (no regression).

quality.description: Scores per rubrics/quality-rubric.md (each 0-5) plus the objective tools/quality_check.py result.

simplicity.description: Is this the simplest change that works? (5 = minimal, no incidental complexity).

readability.description: Clear names, obvious control flow, easy to follow.

comment_hygiene.description: Comments earn their place; no long redundant blocks (backed by quality_check max_comment_block / long_comment_lines).

organization.description: Files and functions land in the right place; repo stays well organised.

style_match.description: Matches the surrounding code's existing conventions, layout, and idiom.

objective.description: Raw JSON emitted by tools/quality_check.py for the changed files (ok, violations, per_file).

quality_pass.description: True iff no quality axis is below the rubric's floor AND quality_check reported no threshold violations.

gate_failures.description: Hard-gate breaches forcing pass=false: a failing required test, a regression, a syntax/compile error, the Engineer editing a test file, or a quality_check threshold violation.

pass.description: The keep gate: failed == 0 AND regression_green AND quality_pass AND gate_failures is empty.

fixes.description: Ranked, concrete actions for the Engineer's next refine round. Required whenever pass is false; each must name a fix the Engineer can apply directly.

summary.description: One or two sentences: the verdict and the single most important thing to fix next.
